label: http api • json_object mode over SSE: joined deltas parse and validate
query: Return a JSON object with exactly two keys: "city" (a string) and "population" (an integer) for any real city. Output only the JSON object.
notes: The streaming half of the structured-output contract: JSON mode must survive chunked SSE delivery — the concatenated content deltas (not any single chunk) must parse as one JSON object and validate against the schema, and the stream must still terminate with [DONE]. Off-CI (needs a model).
